Friend,

We flipped this seat from BLUE to RED, and now Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us. She's flooded this district with $20+ million over the last four years and is ready to spend even more to buy this seat out from under us.

[**Can you rush in a contribution to defend this seat from Pelosi 's never-ending campaign war chest? Our critical end of month deadline is just 24 hours away and we remain one of Pelosi's top-targets.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ioEN5ApevjZ7mdiQ1uVzLyUKqyvoNXhCF7nPZ-Esqg8n7bq3J--yYV-dViHMJCbCRbpkyZOS40y5KillOArK_Tu4xa9bNIZ7pExtceHf6PGwdnPGC8qUreqqTTny_9N0q3E5RI1p2w32HmacOjHCJKDmfY-5AeDlCCVUA986T70wjZ6Lee9kd-H8EOR3r5rUHXuiwU6TH7Eqo-HQfnIhBdbZ3EB3wtVTnozxmqIiGzAcDqxEq0uSRcabo1ZIHW2luUxqRGyp4i-KXu-iov95AMpqHymaoQV6DlH-hry-p69vgZ9ebj7xDlvyxF4Jf9o_yv5WZ788lT2w5Cvgk0R23csDZ6FlFj_F_yPviNoSlPNLSmLnXfB3feDuHplpb-qw66TqcI5W0VL640rvB33fjvxaj812wEz4d3G7qEbvgd5efdYeORsheyT8XGWwvWuh_MzASaQAbZ9APzCL5qsEwQ==&c=zLl5YH-XO-YsnyI7pm_lTLK0KBqF5J46UDUyci9kHzLx0hizs422RQ==&ch=6IgRKPMLbThFN9xPADemtr06YQ0C_VmFimpHzWKGObLmRtQ16Gy5YA==)

Young Kim is an immigrant and life-long conservative fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's been a leader on the issues of affordability and homelessness -- the issues Californians face every day.

_That means lower taxes and fewer taxes, leaving more of your paycheck in your wallet._
_That means getting rid of red tape that is burdening small businesses, allowing them to thrive.
That means building a better, brighter future for California, providing hardworking Americans with more opportunity._

**But our ability to do all ^ that ^ relies on the support of grassroots supporters, like you, chipping in what you can to help fight off Pelosi 's army and defend this seat from the Far Left.**

With our end of month deadline just hours away and the House Majority within reach, this fight is too important to sit out. [**Chip in HERE before TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT to take back the House for Republicans.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ioEN5ApevjZ7mdiQ1uVzLyUKqyvoNXhCF7nPZ-Esqg8n7bq3J--yYV-dViHMJCbCRbpkyZOS40y5KillOArK_Tu4xa9bNIZ7pExtceHf6PGwdnPGC8qUreqqTTny_9N0q3E5RI1p2w32HmacOjHCJKDmfY-5AeDlCCVUA986T70wjZ6Lee9kd-H8EOR3r5rUHXuiwU6TH7Eqo-HQfnIhBdbZ3EB3wtVTnozxmqIiGzAcDqxEq0uSRcabo1ZIHW2luUxqRGyp4i-KXu-iov95AMpqHymaoQV6DlH-hry-p69vgZ9ebj7xDlvyxF4Jf9o_yv5WZ788lT2w5Cvgk0R23csDZ6FlFj_F_yPviNoSlPNLSmLnXfB3feDuHplpb-qw66TqcI5W0VL640rvB33fjvxaj812wEz4d3G7qEbvgd5efdYeORsheyT8XGWwvWuh_MzASaQAbZ9APzCL5qsEwQ==&c=zLl5YH-XO-YsnyI7pm_lTLK0KBqF5J46UDUyci9kHzLx0hizs422RQ==&ch=6IgRKPMLbThFN9xPADemtr06YQ0C_VmFimpHzWKGObLmRtQ16Gy5YA==)

Martin
Team Young

We faced one of the toughest races in the nation, unseated Pelosi's Far Left candidate, and flipped a California seat from BLUE to RED. But now, Pelosi's candidate -- the very same candidate we defeated -- is gunning for a rematch. To defeat him, Pelosi, and the Left's dark money machine, we're going to need all hands on deck. That means we're going to need you, Friend.

_[**Can I count on you to chip in $4 right now to defend this seat from the Radical Left?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WRZbBo1f7t0US9kxGx8PzpznsMOQwYhDjHOX8ZKYVJe3BiHfx8H5k-06ffdq1M64Qh6MvIRx5OEMZJBBtmV29FA9nlmwxvXprgOt23sHYQo1fx4EwFdO_IiNki09WYD_X21ZmkUgXgo5sAU1FVk4wQrAsDrQlJ68xAltdys49t0efTdEN3PPIEug0R88pLYOxPyor7vP4uHtmrZ_XQjTA9KBigIo3LKVZHIbSjyBK7MKy-edKxpTq79qHcjs0BlpD15HNhPIzpJ_E0FfWEXqGULpqZSLTC8Qs9kSf8lvOardELsbt8dBWE67eNdnL_t_lk2cWkLLD8ih3WuDsHofGoU3AFGms6XFyHsR0SOYgqRCoRlEpsZrHT41374uuL6DjOtfvaEcKJPr2fKZpzR_IRsofTYv6sm0_ewmAllR1Ng=&c=Mx5IsozByWjQcs2LNFc4ELdl0mpsyYiNy7zV6VaD9utRDA-XuEkatQ==&ch=RTZROVkQ1OjpT7qQcXhKAelww61AdCcBmX3QSPS3PCReNfyGSLDR6w==) Our critical end of month fundraising deadline is just 24 hours away and reaching our goal is our first line of defense against Pelosi's deep pockets and the Democrats' bottomless campaign war chests._

When I came to America searching for opportunity with the hope of a better future. I watched her mother -- a single mom and small business owner -- struggle, unable to fight against a faltering tax system because she didn't have the resources. But right now, I need your help. There are just a handful of seats standing between us and the House Majority and right now we are $7,028 short of where we need to be. subject: I need your help--the stakes are still too high

body:
Hello,

Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we didn't lose in battleground districts like they thought we would. In fact we gained more seats in the House.

But Nancy Pelosi and her Democrats still control the House of Representatives, and with runoff elections coming up in Georgia, **the Democrats might control the Senate as well. **

But if you think that Nancy Pelosi has nothing to do with a Democrat-controlled Senate then you are absolutely wrong because it makes her actions EVEN MORE DANGEROUS TO OUR COUNTRY'S FUTURE.

**EMERGENCY 500% MATCHING TO STOP PELOSI**

[**Stop Pelosi**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rNQKkZuVHiTcLxcayZnJkEXbjiuE1040hwF11atwk6WkL-EmVM4AurY1ZIGColgpdCoP70KqFQUDpeAGTaXAklJ4BM-0cMvoHgdrnqh8-Neb3vhNxds2qiFPBweCl-GIRnYRBNfyBIHUoZ_0RbmVDqQBMXxKO_J1xvOmtVclOFZq_-OVVWUtiaiFNPlLn5Ssqrsya90DzJ2iS1_OzElzvn0lA1IemkLnyp-pF8_-VP7iUx1XShU4W-OiH6idJ-llHr6HRxQCKw48v7SIyCNuCpWWE6VcS0YpdADmR04YqS9SQH5HDz-NM8kenvq9amdGaFDNkdcTUzdzmGmMYnR-FFRFKTw1vKfFgi8tDgVg23rHOQ_ijddKrmS9DgqaK06vlK_jdBpkbaxQWz6HjV-hlvL9y6gpUbM7NxfTomH5WkXk8p4VxSr_dorjDa3XSK9HsSdb4f7gOFQ=&c=QoLpfi6dXjdBdnbdpY5zlCI8Jk3LphUzjcXPwY2c7ymBzZaj9Q3h5w==&ch=9VaT6o5HVP1UZRr-O7VWlVDcX3ap_DzRzl7Qn8Oh58jT-09ek98lVQ==)

**I am here to ask for YOUR help to stop her. **

**You 're one of the strongest patriots I know--which is why I'm asking you to join me in this critical fight for our nation's future. [Until midnight, I've been authorized to 500% match anything you give.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rNQKkZuVHiTcLxcayZnJkEXbjiuE1040hwF11atwk6WkL-EmVM4AurY1ZIGColgpdCoP70KqFQUDpeAGTaXAklJ4BM-0cMvoHgdrnqh8-Neb3vhNxds2qiFPBweCl-GIRnYRBNfyBIHUoZ_0RbmVDqQBMXxKO_J1xvOmtVclOFZq_-OVVWUtiaiFNPlLn5Ssqrsya90DzJ2iS1_OzElzvn0lA1IemkLnyp-pF8_-VP7iUx1XShU4W-OiH6idJ-llHr6HRxQCKw48v7SIyCNuCpWWE6VcS0YpdADmR04YqS9SQH5HDz-NM8kenvq9amdGaFDNkdcTUzdzmGmMYnR-FFRFKTw1vKfFgi8tDgVg23rHOQ_ijddKrmS9DgqaK06vlK_jdBpkbaxQWz6HjV-hlvL9y6gpUbM7NxfTomH5WkXk8p4VxSr_dorjDa3XSK9HsSdb4f7gOFQ=&c=QoLpfi6dXjdBdnbdpY5zlCI8Jk3LphUzjcXPwY2c7ymBzZaj9Q3h5w==&ch=9VaT6o5HVP1UZRr-O7VWlVDcX3ap_DzRzl7Qn8Oh58jT-09ek98lVQ==)**
[**Stop Pelosi**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rNQKkZuVHiTcLxcayZnJkEXbjiuE1040hwF11atwk6WkL-EmVM4AurY1ZIGColgpdCoP70KqFQUDpeAGTaXAklJ4BM-0cMvoHgdrnqh8-Neb3vhNxds2qiFPBweCl-GIRnYRBNfyBIHUoZ_0RbmVDqQBMXxKO_J1xvOmtVclOFZq_-OVVWUtiaiFNPlLn5Ssqrsya90DzJ2iS1_OzElzvn0lA1IemkLnyp-pF8_-VP7iUx1XShU4W-OiH6idJ-llHr6HRxQCKw48v7SIyCNuCpWWE6VcS0YpdADmR04YqS9SQH5HDz-NM8kenvq9amdGaFDNkdcTUzdzmGmMYnR-FFRFKTw1vKfFgi8tDgVg23rHOQ_ijddKrmS9DgqaK06vlK_jdBpkbaxQWz6HjV-hlvL9y6gpUbM7NxfTomH5WkXk8p4VxSr_dorjDa3XSK9HsSdb4f7gOFQ=&c=QoLpfi6dXjdBdnbdpY5zlCI8Jk3LphUzjcXPwY2c7ymBzZaj9Q3h5w==&ch=9VaT6o5HVP1UZRr-O7VWlVDcX3ap_DzRzl7Qn8Oh58jT-09ek98lVQ==)

If Democrats take the Senate, every radical bill that Pelosi's Democrats pass in the House will be passed in the Senate as well --- _**which means Nancy Pelosi can do whatever she wants.**_

Our nation's future rests in your hands.

WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME LEFT!

[**We must work together if we want to defeat the Democrats. We are running out of time to take a stand, so I 'm counting on you to act now!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rNQKkZuVHiTcLxcayZnJkEXbjiuE1040hwF11atwk6WkL-EmVM4AurY1ZIGColgpdCoP70KqFQUDpeAGTaXAklJ4BM-0cMvoHgdrnqh8-Neb3vhNxds2qiFPBweCl-GIRnYRBNfyBIHUoZ_0RbmVDqQBMXxKO_J1xvOmtVclOFZq_-OVVWUtiaiFNPlLn5Ssqrsya90DzJ2iS1_OzElzvn0lA1IemkLnyp-pF8_-VP7iUx1XShU4W-OiH6idJ-llHr6HRxQCKw48v7SIyCNuCpWWE6VcS0YpdADmR04YqS9SQH5HDz-NM8kenvq9amdGaFDNkdcTUzdzmGmMYnR-FFRFKTw1vKfFgi8tDgVg23rHOQ_ijddKrmS9DgqaK06vlK_jdBpkbaxQWz6HjV-hlvL9y6gpUbM7NxfTomH5WkXk8p4VxSr_dorjDa3XSK9HsSdb4f7gOFQ=&c=QoLpfi6dXjdBdnbdpY5zlCI8Jk3LphUzjcXPwY2c7ymBzZaj9Q3h5w==&ch=9VaT6o5HVP1UZRr-O7VWlVDcX3ap_DzRzl7Qn8Oh58jT-09ek98lVQ==)

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw

body:
It pains me to say this to you.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015jXrJNGan4Se5FL8xT1Bl8gHlo0rC7oRhys5u2zB1bhn4nEqPXXKVyJZLpvykNjdTEWAPz0RCDrDPnoYzcCrljEWu_ths2Vf4nsKu1hRao0frALA9H9SsEixshs4xkjEUb5ayI1BzEq4JSlKZUggNN1RAZhVfF9GvfAK2YpBEdUVesem0oXZQuMPDRH4xtpQXDjJlOsreW95DsDdoQtyVX8Bhc6HBDEMEotRQFQb6xYteRyxEiYvXd0EuyqG-eshpm46cTpAziI5t5njdVGfSkzetzJ1gdz9mas7cdjkb1Xo-z5fU8OE0Si_XCeQWhiZNanoCvOJFVhLpZarUlXyQVIjfegW3a-ifr8pMm191AsSW_IxYtYpsD8Eiogo5hFpyn38U2KwQG9bD2EGOM_0cg==&c=LyvqYSzLRZEUQrcPFxedBnkGpTEEY3Yzc3zi-MEIk7lQsh3Atlw53w==&ch=y2Gdhs5q2PgfMLruPTbWYjqNfzKHzwgR7y7FwCbeSLpz2-90tuTsvg==)

Friend,

**We 're facing the most important deadline of our campaign and we're still short of our goal. **

We could just give up on the most ambitious grassroots fundraising goal in our nation's history, but that spirit is not what this campaign represents.

body:
My friend David Perdue needs YOUR help. name%%

The fight for the Senate Majority is not quite over, and if we're going to keep the Senate **RED** this year, my friend **David Perdue** needs YOUR help.

**[**STAND WITH DAVID PERDUE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bmQ9XFWfG4_HBdYfskFHY7Gb447pXUSNgH6nCujtSg34eDVm15ZmcXbzGuhVj4VIYYjHHnKLgbRU9GHHwNblElbrhlbtWGh_6JIe2X4f2uiKxPVySc2xfRQWSgzbS084N9ZqVK6BtkXWh6l-CBg8qpePTPkMnDSpeZYJqXDM0Axs0DNg5ChLryPffJSqrWl8isnUA3EvQMnayWkGdP1VonZ6oCLkF5ZoHQQPgxSim5wjynrJXsHG-Sz9gAqz88ZNe42XMrQgrt2gpx0BcJP4G3CI1y0d5kguqll0FzK2vmOmhpTZCwVVts-vYLAueOsls7kv_ZXnSVrYD_qrq1EIrq3ulPEdSIPGVZ9DJcbiunhXyZ7a80Yagx1jxW_vK6GsPTxuwBYg5lOzZ3s69wK7U3vDY9-6bmXg4425VPMLJX8pPRAi-vod0G96OlpE9E0x&c=gBY6diTD2FD6VFObU8MUsAVAnYMVLLB76JWlOxtfa8R8BxwatUmXzg==&ch=qqm9yUVWveYFEz6AL9gZjOnIY-syEXz7jMVMisNoyymMLcJyghDRAw==)**
---

It's no secret that Chuck Schumer and his far-Left allies have been coming after the Senate Majority for MONTHS -- doing whatever it takes to TEAR DOWN conservatives and OUTRAISE us at every turn. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: I need your help--the stakes are still too high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If Democrats take the Senate, every radical bill that Pelosi's Democrats pass in the House will be passed in the Senate as well --- which means Nancy Pelosi can do whatever she wants.

****

Hello,

Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we didn't lose in battleground districts like they thought we would. In fact we gained more seats in the House.

But Nancy Pelosi and her Democrats still control the House of Representatives, and with runoff elections coming up in Georgia, **the Democrats might control the Senate as well. **

But if you think that Nancy Pelosi has nothing to do with a Democrat-controlled Senate then you are absolutely wrong because it makes her actions EVEN MORE DANGEROUS TO OUR COUNTRY'S FUTURE.

**EMERGENCY 500% MATCHING TO STOP PELOSI**

[**Stop Pelosi**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955071:syb5UnKNE:m:1:2247059263:05957BD086BE684F2E9195C36D1D0613:r)

**I am here to ask for YOUR help to stop her. **

**You 're one of the strongest patriots I know--which is why I'm asking you to join me in this critical fight for our nation's future. [Until midnight, I've been authorized to 500% match anything you give.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955071:syb5UnKNE:m:1:2247059263:05957BD086BE684F2E9195C36D1D0613:r)**

[**Stop Pelosi**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955071:syb5UnKNE:m:1:2247059263:05957BD086BE684F2E9195C36D1D0613:r)

If Democrats take the Senate, every radical bill that Pelosi's Democrats pass in the House will be passed in the Senate as well --- _**which means Nancy Pelosi can do whatever she wants.**_

Our nation's future rests in your hands.

WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME LEFT!

[**We must work together if we want to defeat the Democrats. We are running out of time to take a stand, so I 'm counting on you to act now!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955071:syb5UnKNE:m:1:2247059263:05957BD086BE684F2E9195C36D1D0613:r)

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw

[**Stop Pelosi - 5X Match**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955071:syb5UnKNE:m:1:2247059263:05957BD086BE684F2E9195C36D1D0613:r)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: How to help in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/nGsDLR1IQWFe-_48oMD20kGyI9ljrRiru6gejWZU4wk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201129-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Dear Peter,

The General Election has come and gone, but there are still two crucial upcoming races that need your help. You - the Team Spanberger volunteer community - powered our campaign, and we want to share a few ways to volunteer in the Georgia Senate races if you are interested in doing so.

In Georgia, Democrats Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff are campaigning hard ahead of two runoff elections. Georgia's runoff Election Day is January 5th, but early voting begins in mid-December, so there is no time to waste to reach every last voter!

Here are a few ways to volunteer:
* Sign up to volunteer with the _**[Warnock Campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/8E0nSYMKUll-kyORTR81CYni8qL20jP18R2YNNPnvQc=)**_
* Sign up to volunteer with the _**[Ossoff Campaign](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/-aVb0z9jx3lLoZKmnbNnJCR2aOmymcC69cdDR2bS-7Q=)**_
* Sign up to volunteer with Stacey Abrams' voting rights organization _**[Fair Fight Action](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/xpt3cCd8QNoE_1lz9lep7L9xF3cwsynSguOcaLSdzhw=)**_

Financial support is also crucial to the success of each campaign. _**[If you're able, consider splitting a contribution between the Jon Ossoff Senate Campaign and the Raphael Warnock Senate Campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/_rXKZf68IG7K64SKN9Ve4TVtHqJj2IXu-RU3SDGGDas=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201129-1-EM&amount=25)**_

All across the country, Americans turned out in record numbers to vote this year. The Ossoff and Warnock races have built a big grassroots, people-powered campaign just like we did here in Central Virginia, but they need fresh resources and more support if they are going to win in January.

It's time for our country to move forward in unity and cooperation so that we can focus on addressing the major challenges, like the Covid-19 pandemic and economic recession, facing our country.

Thank you,

Abigail Spanberger
---

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/nGsDLR1IQWFe-_48oMD20kGyI9ljrRiru6gejWZU4wk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201129-1-EM&amount=25)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/KCblpDqE2isLIEQ6n-9xGpShRq4dNYTFSRCiaSTaZIg=).
| [DONATE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/aC2cwUPcrjZJ69FOXFSyS85ZOOmY17cMxhCToZ48U7g=/nGsDLR1IQWFe-_48oMD20kGyI9ljrRiru6gejWZU4wk=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20201129-1-EM&amount=25)

body:
If Democrats take the Senate, every radical bill that Pelosi's Democrats pass in the House will be passed in the Senate as well --- which means Nancy Pelosi can do whatever she wants.

****

Hello,

Despite all of our top critics' expectations, we didn't lose in battleground districts like they thought we would. In fact we gained more seats in the House.

But Nancy Pelosi and her Democrats still control the House of Representatives, and with runoff elections coming up in Georgia, **the Democrats might control the Senate as well. **

But if you think that Nancy Pelosi has nothing to do with a Democrat-controlled Senate then you are absolutely wrong because it makes her actions EVEN MORE DANGEROUS TO OUR COUNTRY'S FUTURE.

**EMERGENCY 500% MATCHING TO STOP PELOSI**

[**Stop Pelosi**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955095:sdD9RnK9N:m:1:2247059263:E0FC2EA6CCDB1C5E28648EC3F53B91FD:r)

**I am here to ask for YOUR help to stop her. **

**You 're one of the strongest patriots I know--which is why I'm asking you to join me in this critical fight for our nation's future. [Until midnight, I've been authorized to 500% match anything you give.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955095:sdD9RnK9N:m:1:2247059263:E0FC2EA6CCDB1C5E28648EC3F53B91FD:r)**

If Democrats take the Senate, every radical bill that Pelosi's Democrats pass in the House will be passed in the Senate as well --- _**which means Nancy Pelosi can do whatever she wants.**_

Our nation's future rests in your hands.

WE DON'T HAVE MUCH TIME LEFT!

[**We must work together if we want to defeat the Democrats. We are running out of time to take a stand, so I 'm counting on you to act now!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56955095:sdD9RnK9N:m:1:2247059263:E0FC2EA6CCDB1C5E28648EC3F53B91FD:r)

Thank you,

Dan Crenshaw

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: IMPORTANT: Pause begins tomorrow
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Beginning tomorrow, Rhode Island is entering a two-week pause. These temporary restrictions are crucial to prevent overwhelming our hospital system, save lives, and avoid a more severe lockdown. You can watch the video below for a list of the rules that will be in effect during the pause, or read on to see the list in writing.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001boHFkPwA3-SswrAas6HGHc11J1ern4azwcOprnK7KqQ_N5HiQX4woNiPPM569emJhKf5aArIhMARqxO28h_jgL8Z278DY1t3yOdZ_dmmwdBXDVKAu5SO7YzCTXdnNTdYEvDYrDAZnuzHvA_DOwY5frUyFLr001yOIs7clzvCMw_33Wby3q8oqQ==&c=LfpSIUZyORon6WxDsTzePL5nKHaxoBhgPkdZnSW4TbrEbqw7VyYsGA==&ch=gGLi_UyUQ4Bh-SfXpsc7x9dvwwd7jemlZovhU8exj4p-pYbQJaKoZQ==)
---
| The following will remain open:
* All Pre-K-8 classrooms will stay open. Health experts like Brown's Dr. Ashish Jha have advocated for keeping these schools open, and we know how important in-person learning is for kids' intellectual, social, mental, and nutritional health.
* Childcare is essential for working parents, and we've been able to operate a safe childcare system that has become a national model during COVID.
* Manufacturing and construction jobs, with regular surveillance testing for workers.
* Personal services like hair and nail salons.
* Healthcare appointments. Please do not put these appointments off. We saw that in the spring, and today we're seeing significant delayed health issues.

The following will be limited during the pause:
* Superintendents may choose to shift high schools to limited in-person learning. Students with special learning needs and others who need in-person instruction must continue to receive it.
* Social gatherings are still limited just to those in your immediate household.
* Indoor dining will be scaled back to 33% capacity and continue to close early. Restaurants will be required to only seat members from the same household together at one table indoors.
* Retail will stay open with the existing capacity limits of 1 person per 100 sq. ft. for most retail and 1 person per 150 sq. ft. for big box stores.
* Houses of worship can remain open, but with a maximum of 25% capacity, and we encourage everyone to consider worshipping virtually.

The following will be closed during this two-week pause:
* Most colleges and universities are finishing their semesters remotely.
* All offices that can work remotely are strongly encouraged to do so.
* Bar areas in restaurants and bars will be closed for the full two weeks. Drinks can still be served to customers seated at tables.
* Recreational venues like bowling alleys, theaters, and casinos will also be fully closed, as will indoor sporting facilities, gyms and all group fitness classes, and organized sports other than college and professional sports.

---
|
---
| Tomorrow morning, an alert will be sent to your phones with a reminder about these new measures.
This will not be easy, but I am pleading with you to take it seriously. Choosing to gather with those outside your household will have ripple effects that will increase the strain on our hospitals and put lives at risk. Please, put health and safety first, and stay home for the next two weeks as much as possible.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001boHFkPwA3-SswrAas6HGHc11J1ern4azwcOprnK7KqQ_N5HiQX4woJm51F_jdKgqjxr5n1tC2mycKcLiUpKpSZneHTX80q20r67ttM2ZnVjgMpMb0iSZ0OH1SFWJbVm2Vutj6iSA-Jjv6CF64fsK5CXFhZcWKt34DJXxdgCmxntI_d9zhxDftpZlpwf3yaWQi2AImRx2Juh2H7Eaxz8OrLRSxDd_oPe4pmiHk_PLV4TBvvUfHhsGzQTcwygahDsx6cLWuB9VEHa5CTaeB-_gCQcps2mt_bqTfAT3MuyWAmHi3c69z8MZrvKfyzg163FSFQ7Mb7TS3MY=&c=LfpSIUZyORon6WxDsTzePL5nKHaxoBhgPkdZnSW4TbrEbqw7VyYsGA==&ch=gGLi_UyUQ4Bh-SfXpsc7x9dvwwd7jemlZovhU8exj4p-pYbQJaKoZQ==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=4add9324-d7dc-4e8c-9003-b5d20078525d)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=4add9324-d7dc-4e8c-9003-b5d20078525d) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: President Trump Is Coming To Georgia
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/6caaf1c4457c/watch-senator-david-perdue-on-fox-news-georgia-is-the-last-line-of-defense-66447?e=02cd889ad3)
President Trump Is Coming To Georgia

Folks -

We are thrilled to welcome President Donald Trump to Georgia next Saturday! Stay tuned - we’ll be sending out information on how to get tickets in the coming days.

Yesterday, we gave you a sneak peak of our latest ad, “Even Stronger”.

Click here (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8jMAOFuqN1Q&feature=youtu.be&mc_cid=c5d9b345c8&mc_eid=[UNIQID]&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) or below to watch and share the ad.

https://twitter.com/Perduesenate/status/1333071347082211344?s=20&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

SUPPORTING SMALL BUSINESSES →
Yesterday was Small Business Saturday. Senator David Perdue has a proven track record of getting results for our small businesses. He has worked to reduce regulations and enable business owners to make the best decisions for their own companies. Georgia has been named the best state in the country in which to do business for eight years in a row because of Georgia's business-friendly leaders, like Senator Perdue.

When COVID-19 hit our state, Senator Perdue got to work to implement relief that could ease the complications of this uncertain time. The CARES Act that saved over 1.5 million jobs in Georgia. Nearly 175 thousand small businesses in Georgia kept their doors open with the help of a CARES loan. Through the Payment Protection Program (PPP), Senator Perdue secured $14.6 billion for Georgia small businesses, covering 86% of the state's small business payroll.

Jon Ossoff -- he's another story. Rather than advocate for the Georgia families who were hit hard by the pandemic, he publicly attacked the PPP that provided relief for those who needed it most -- all while his family’s business gleefully accepted (https://freebeacon.com/2020-election/after-ossoff-ripped-ppp-for-favoring-wealthy-his-father-took-huge-loan/?mc_cid=d88f3dfe9e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) the funding. The National Republican Senatorial Committee highlighted (https://twitter.com/NRSC/status/1329436832745000970?s=20&mc_cid=d88f3dfe9e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) Ossoff's hypocrisy when it comes to the CARES Act and the Paycheck Protection Program in this (https://twitter.com/NRSC/status/1329436832745000970?s=20&mc_cid=d88f3dfe9e&mc_eid=[UNIQID]&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) video.
https://twitter.com/NRSC/status/1329436832745000970?s=20&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
OSSOFF SUPPORTS LOCKDOWNS →
This morning on CNN, Jon Ossoff made it clear that a vote for him is a vote to support Bernie Sanders’ radical liberal agenda (https://twitter.com/bluestein/status/1333063399102685193?s=20&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

“I welcome his support. His advocacy for ensuring that health care is a human right in this country, for putting the interests of working families over corporate interests is welcome, is necessary, is appreciated. And so is his support.”

He also revealed (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tYp6GQLvmR4&feature=youtu.be&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) his support for nationwide lockdowns -- much like the ones being implemented by leftist governors in New York and California, where businesses are shuttered and families are unallowed to be together for the holidays.

Ossoff isn't hiding his radicalism, he's telling us who he really is. We should believe him.

RELIGIOUS FREEDOM →
The Supreme Court delivered a big win for religious freedom on Wednesday. USA Today reported (https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2020/11/26/religious-freedom-supreme-court-blocks-covid-limits-n-y-churches/3767379001/?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) :

The court's new, more conservative majority ruled 5-4 that Gov. Andrew Cuomo's limits on churches, synagogues and other houses of worship to 10 or 25 worshipers in hard-hit regions appeared to violate the First Amendment's Free Exercise Clause.

“Even in a pandemic, the Constitution cannot be put away and forgotten,” the court's unsigned majority opinion said. “The restrictions at issue here, by effectively barring many from attending religious services, strike at the very heart of the First Amendment’s guarantee of religious liberty.”

ANTI-POLICE PAC SUPPORTING OSSOFF →
The anti-police BLM PAC has pledged (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/blm-raising-500k-to-back-ossoff-warnock-in-georgia-senate-race?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) $500,000 to support the Ossoff-Warnock ticket. Among a number of radical policy positions, the group supports the BREATHE Act, a bill introduced by “The Squad” that would defund the police, empty prisons, and abolish ICE, along with a litany of other proposals that would weaken public safety.

We need your help to defend the majority against this onslaught of far-left funding. Please, chip in here (https://linkprotect.cudasvc.com/url?a=https%3a%2f%2fperduesenate.us14.list-manage.com%2ftrack%2fclick%3fu%3d4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e%26id%3dcad41d67a6%26e%3dab535b1a6f&c=E,1,aupwuktaIAn2GNuLSFyATNQkQy8YgQhBvhl1-2Nj4XxMjjVZNQIo-z31uleqAv7xrqo3exObC7v5oz3dVL5k-enBpJHjIIfE9XoT7rru_17hxngTMscNnv2nvT8,&typo=1&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
In the News

JACK KINGSTON →
“This election is the last line of defense to stop the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, DC statehood, total repeal of tax cuts, more regulation, and more shutdown of business.”
Click here (https://twitter.com/Perduesenate/status/1332459190493859845?s=20&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to watch former Congressman Jack Kingston lay out what’s at stake on Fox News.

TIM SCOTT →
“[These are] the most consequential two Senate seats in all of America at all times... We have to have a firewall for America, and that firewall starts and ends with those two seats in Georgia.”
Click here (https://twitter.com/Perduesenate/status/1332399038826680324?s=20&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to watch Senator Tim Scott on Fox News.

STEVE SCALISE →
“I think ... everybody that looks at all of these planned shifts to the left the socialists that are fighting in the House to say that they are going to go back to open borders — I mean, even Joe Biden’s talking about stopping the building of the wall and literally just letting anybody into this country, regardless of what a legal process is — ought to recognize that the only way to stop any of this is in the United States Senate right now, and those two seats are everything. It’s all on the line. I know I have already hosted events. We’ve raised over $200,000, and I hope everybody stays engaged in those races. I hope the people of Georgia vote for both Senator Perdue and Senator Loeffler. Everything is on the line.”
Click here (https://twitter.com/Perduesenate/status/1332791375901859840?s=20&mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to watch Steve Scalise on Fox News.

Thomasville Times-Enterprise (https://www.timesenterprise.com/news/state_news/perdue-trump-deserves-support-for-speedy-vaccine-work/article_b4461f2d-bb89-5240-8cea-dcd4381dc268.html?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Perdue: Trump deserves support for speedy vaccine work

Inoculations for a COVID-19 vaccine could be ready as early as next month, U.S. Sen. David Perdue said. Perdue, making a campaign stop in Thomasville on Tuesday, said Vice President Mike Pence has informed him that the vaccines could be ready soon, thanks to the efforts of the White House’s Operation Warp Speed.

Associated Press (https://apnews.com/article/election-2020-senate-elections-georgia-coronavirus-pandemic-elections-dc60d44f729dbb4d551a049fc9935b98?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Senate control brings new urgency to Georgia turnout drive
“Let’s not kid ourselves: This is a real race,” said Rove, who is leading fundraising efforts for the runoffs.

The National Republican Senatorial Committee expects to have 1,000 staffers on the ground in Georgia. For comparison, the Republican National Committee had a total of 3,000 paid field staff across the whole country during the presidential race.

ALERT: Facebook has banned us from advertising. Help us get our message out by passing this along to five friends.

PLUS - Interested in joining the effort to defend the majority? Click the Volunteer button below.

###

DONATE NOW! (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/perdueforsenate?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
VOLUNTEER (https://perduesenate.com/get-involved/volunteer/?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Join us at PerdueSenate.com and make this the largest grassroots effort in Georgia history to re-elect Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler.

============================================================
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
** Website (http://mailchimp.com?mc_cid=59f94134ac&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Copyright © Perdue For Senate, All rights reserved.

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=59f94134ac)

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: We Are Going to Need All Hands On Deck
body:
Peter,
Did you see Governor Huckabee’s email from last week? I feel compelled to underscore his announcement.

[**This Tuesday, December 1st is Giving Tuesday and it will be an all-hands-on-deck fundraising day as My Faith Votes works to hit our $100,000 goal.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201129apl01nd&n=1)
Every dollar you give between now and next Tuesday will be matched dollar-for-dollar until we hit our Giving Tuesday goal.
With the Georgia runoff elections set for January 5, the new year will be starting off with a bang. And, just weeks after that, both the President and a new Congress will be sworn in, and the fight for our Judeo-Christian values will begin anew.
Tuesday is our opportunity to start the engines, so please get ready.
It’s set to be a big day and we hope you will be able to help.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201201apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201129apl01nd&n=2)
Steadfast and Loyal,
Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201129apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201129apl01nd&n=4).

Fellow Conservative,

We wrote you about this the other day. This situation could not be more urgent.

The two U.S. Senate runoff elections next door in Georgia on January 5th will decide who wins majority control... if the Democrats win, they’ll be positioned to seize FULL CONTROL of our federal government next year!

We’re sending all the support we can to Senator David Perdue and Senator Kelly Loeffler. It’s all hands-on deck to KEEP GEORGIA RED and SAVE THE SENATE.

---
| | **ONE:** We’re building the most robust and progressive vision for a District Attorney race that Manhattan has ever seen. **TWO:** But our challengers are fighting back against our vision and goals -- and now, we’re neck-and-neck in fundraising. **THREE:** So we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 by the end of month to bring the momentum moving forward for our campaign. [_**Can you chip in now to our campaign for change? 100% of your donation goes directly to building our team, contacting voters, and organizing with impacted communities in NYC.**_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=f2d93e2dbf&e=7758ed002e)
---
| [Donate $20.20 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=f2663f43b7&e=7758ed002e "Donate $20.20 >>")
---
| [Donate $50 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=8ae1794c37&e=7758ed002e "Donate $50 >>")
---
| [Donate $100 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=b1c9d54e71&e=7758ed002e "Donate $100 >>")
---
| [Donate a custom amount >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=418f770eb1&e=7758ed002e "Donate a custom amount >>")
---
| **We believe in radical transparency, both as a campaign, and for the District Attorney’s office, so we’re going to show you what your donations pay for: **
* We’ve been organizing better than any campaign. We’ve reached out to more than 100,000 New Yorkers. We knocked on every door in East Harlem’s Jefferson Houses. We made 6,318 mutual aid calls during the peak of COVID.
* We’ve published bold policies, including[ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=bebba2d13f&e=7758ed002e)[**combatting wage theft**](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=e175f50ae4&e=7758ed002e),[ **ending solitary confinement in Manhattan**](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=9cea32d6d2&e=7758ed002e),[ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=3bfaa0d044&e=7758ed002e)and bringing a culture of [**restorative justice**](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=100133b51b&e=7758ed002e) to our city.
* And we’ve campaigned for allies such as Jamaal Bowman, Jessica Gonzalez-Rojas, and Zohran Mamdani who defeated incumbents in the 2020 elections, bringing our vision for justice to Albany and DC.

[_**We’ll never be bankrolled or controlled by big money donors, that’s why we need your help today. Can you chip in at least $20.20 to keep our fight for a Progressive Manhattan going strong?**_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=f4a0c639c7&e=7758ed002e)
---
| [Donate $20.20 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=013e7b18ae&e=7758ed002e "Donate $20.20 >>")
---
